properties.description: Consolidated security operations dashboard combining data from UniFi Network and Palo Alto connectors for unified threat visibility and incident response metrics.
properties.serializedData: {"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Security Operations Dashboard"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"union UniFi_CL, PaloAlto_CL | summarize count() by Type, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)","resourceIds":["/subscriptions/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/resourceGroups/rg-sentinel/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/law-sentinel"]}}]}
